title: Preparing for the worst: RAF Lossiemouth tests response to airfield emergency

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Preparing for the worst: RAF Lossiemouth tests response to airfield emergency. RAF Lossiemouth has been testing its capability to deal with an emergency incident while continuing to protect the UK northern airspace.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Preparing for the worst: RAF Lossiemouth tests response to airfield emergency
